reviews.review_title: I did enjoy the game but....
reviews.review_description:
I've played these type of wash games before and it is a chilled therapeutic experience however, I hate not having a free movement option, I do not like to teleport.. Also in thr bathroom scene, there is nothing to teleport ontop of.. I play seated and cannot see ontop of shelves and photos to see if my water is reaching the dirt up there..
Also while washing the wall I wasn't finished and it auto completed?? Just went shiny like you only need to do a certain % or. Something... That doesn't make sense if you are making us find a spec of dirt left on a single item tbh.
It's pretty good, but not even close to the other pressure washing game. Some areas are frustrating, not as realistic and teleporting is the only movement  option.

I loved the game. I think the sequence was out of order. I wish the last one was the entire skate park. It was shorter than earlier levels. I would love to see a larger challenging level. Still a great game. Good job

Doesn't register correctly when a scene is all cleaned. Frustrating wondering why the scene won't complete when there is nothing left to clean. If you came here from the other pressure washer game, it does not compare at all.

If you find YouTube videos of strangers pressure washing rugs/walkways/fences then this game is for you!  There is a light story mode which follows your washing empire.  You start off with 3 nozzles and can upgrade them as you get cash for completing jobs.  There is something satisfying about seeing the dirt and grime wash away that brings me back for more.  I really like how the ledges, handles, and crevices are really dirty in a 3D space and require you to move around to the right angle to clean them.  

This is a very straightforward game, so it would be nice if had more Easter eggs hidden in the stages to improve replayability .  For instance it would be funny if the cat walking around the first stage was black, and you could wash him into another color, or even clean the cars driving around some of the stages.  Maybe have other moving objects like birds or UFOs that come in briefly and can be interacted with the water blasts.

I also had an itch to break some of the objects in the stage, but they remain static to my water blasting .  Maybe there could be a cost (or bonus) for destroying clients belongings .  I would have also enjoyed if I could watch or listen to YouTube as the in game music gets old after 15 mins.

This game is worth it, some kinda zen relaxing vibe to it. Understand that you can teleport on top of some things, you are not told this and you will get stuck if you dont know or forget. I would love a sequel or some DLC. I think a Game+ where you buy soap for hard to clean stuff or a time trial.

I have edited this since the error what was giving me is fixed and really appreciated the devs for taking time on fixing it hehe game is really enjoyable. It will take the stress out of you :P For those who are having problems when enter the game and appear in the air, just put the VR System in English language and it will be fixed hehe

I know it’s experimental, but it is a lot of fun. Still needs a lot of work pressure washer if you get out of bounds sticks to the wall. ￼Needs more pressure, takes a lot of time to wash one item, which uses a lot of play time.

I'm really happy with this game. There is no timer, so it can be a relaxing experience. 
The one problem I'm having is, the game states it's playable by sitting. I'm in a wheelchair so I cannot stand up. On the third or fourth level, there is a parasol that I can't reach the top of to clear it out. Without doing that, you cannot proceed to another level. If there was something to stand on in the level, that would be fine. I would give this game 5 stars if this issue were fixed.

developer_response.body: Hi Dave. Thank you for your feedback and the passion for our game. You can try teleporting on the top of the parasol and clean it for now. We will also be taking considering your physical status in game and adding new function in game to help you proceed to the different level.

reviews.review_title: There's no way to wash top of things
reviews.review_description: How do you wash on top of things? I'm stuck on Bus Shelter. It has a dirty roof but there's no way to get to it.

developer_response.body: Hi, Paul. You can teleport to the top of the bus shelter and then use the pressure washer to clean the top. We will optimize playing experience in the future update. Happy Gaming!

reviews.review_description:
Graphics: Mostly good, but it's sometimes difficult to see the dirt.

Replayability: Not so much. I don't like cleaning the same things over and over, in games or in real life.

Movement: Teleport (appropriate for game)

I mention the downsides in my video: https://youtu.be/qt759seNAM8
I agree with the other reviews, it's very therapeutic for me.  Great job developers 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are happy you enjoy it.

reviews.review_description:
So relaxing, great haptic feedback (I use Quest Pro controllers).
My only issue is that I’m to short to reach the top (as for the reality!)

developer_response.body: Hello Barabba. Thank you for your feedback. Just a quick tip, you can teleport on the top of objects.

reviews.review_description:
This is such a great game. I am hooked on it and hope they offer more levels as DLC. One issue I have with the game is that sometimes, you can get trapped in a corner of a picture frame or something that's way too close to the wall needs cleaning. The sprayer is too long and it is very difficult to reach some spots. In the bathroom one, that issue is present and in trying to get into the corner, I wound up outside the bathroom in the yard and could not get back in. Luckily, I was able to click Save and Exit so I didn't lose progress.

The bigger issue that I hope they fix or make optional, is sometimes you are cleaning a wall or floor or part of something and the game will finish it for you. All of a sudden, you are halfway up a wall cleaning it and the whole wall turns clean. What's the point of having to power wash stuff if the game is going to do the work for you? That should be disabled or include a way for us to shut that off. I'm dinging it a star for that.

developer_response.body: Hi cvan. Thank you for view and feedback. We have notice these issue and trying to fix them asap.

reviews.review_title: Good but needs better comfort options
reviews.review_description:
Really do love it; but needs a seated mode, game is near enough unplayable from my seating position. 

Smooth loco and smooth turning would be sweet too, maybe ladders and steps for getting up to high places too. Would provide a far more immersive experience than just teleportation. 

Really hope you guys are still going to work on this despite Powerwash Simulator VR coming soon
I like Powerwash much better

I really wanted to like this game. It was very glitchy, and I had to restart it often. I wouldn't say this is a power washing game, more like cleaning with a garden hose. I think this game is more suited for kids than adults.
It’s a really satisfying game, however, it needs a lot more levels even if they are in app purchases
More levels please !!!

I love this game. Perfect for chillin with after a long day or if you just want to relax your mind. If you like videos of people washing rugs or paths, then this game is for you.

My only issue is that I can't see my achievements. The pictures on the wall are not all complete, but i have completed every level 100%. Also I think it would be good if you could earn money by cleaning and be able to buy soaps and upgrade your preasure washer.
